ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-23-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Case dismissed pursuant to CCP 583.210 and 583.250. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2017 Continued To May-23-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2016 Continued To Feb-07-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to FEB-07-2017 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE SUZANNE R. BOLANOS; Clerk MOlopernes/YMazariegos. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2016 Continued To Dec-20-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. No sanctions. Responce to OSC filed on Sep-19-2016. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Dec-20-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. ***Note: Plaintiff Lela Tong is ordered to serve complaint by the next hearing or sanctions will be imposed. Additionally, Plaintiff may need to hire a local attorney to handle this matter.*** JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk RWoods. Proceedings not reported. (610)
